info.title: MCPFactory API Service
info.description: API Gateway for MCPFactory. Handles authentication, proxies to internal services, and exposes the public REST API.

bearerAuth.description: App key (mcpf_app_*) or user key (mcpf_*) via Authorization: Bearer header

apiKey.description: API key (only returned on first creation — save it)

name.description: Unique app name (lowercase, alphanumeric with hyphens)

workflowName.description: Workflow name (e.g. 'sales-email-cold-outreach-sienna'). Determines which execution pipeline to use.

targetAudience.description: Plain text description of who to target (e.g. 'CTOs at SaaS startups with 10-50 employees in the US')

targetOutcome.description: What you want to achieve (e.g. 'Book sales demos', 'Recruit community ambassadors')

valueForTarget.description: What the target audience gains from responding

urgency.description: Time-based constraint that motivates action now (e.g. 'Recruitment closes in 30 days', 'Price doubles after March 1st')

scarcity.description: Supply-based constraint on availability (e.g. 'Only 10 spots available worldwide', 'Limited to 50 participants')

riskReversal.description: Guarantee or safety net that removes risk for the prospect (e.g. 'Free trial for 2 weeks, no commitment', 'Phone screening call before any obligation')

socialProof.description: Evidence of credibility and traction (e.g. 'Backed by 60 sponsors including X, Y, Z', '500+ companies already onboarded')

maxLeads.description: Maximum number of leads to contact

campaignIds.description: Array of campaign IDs to fetch stats for

scope.description: Key scope: 'app' for app-level key (no org/user needed). Omit for org-level BYOK.

name.description: Human-readable name for the API key

sourceRefId.description: Reference ID in the source system

byokApiKey.description: BYOK API key for AI provider

skipCache.description: Skip cached results and force re-scrape

signature.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonical DAG

signatureName.description: Human-readable name for this DAG variant

action.description: Whether the workflow was created or updated

description.description: Natural language description of the desired workflow. Be specific about steps, services, and data flow.

expectedInputs.description: Expected flow_input field names (e.g. campaignId, email)

hints.description: Optional hints to guide DAG generation

get.description: Returns API name, version, and docs URL
Returns service health status
Returns debug info about external service configuration
Returns the OpenAPI 3.0 JSON spec for this service

post.description: Register a new app and receive an API key. Idempotent: returns existing appId if already registered. The API key is only shown on first creation.

get.description: Returns public performance leaderboard data. No authentication required.

200.description: Leaderboard data with brands, models, and hero stats

get.description: Returns the authenticated user and organization details
List all campaigns for the organization, optionally filtered by brand ID

post.description: Create a new outreach campaign. The `workflowName` field determines which execution pipeline campaign-service uses.

get.description: Get a specific campaign by ID
Get execution history/runs for a campaign
Get campaign statistics (leads served/buffered/skipped, apollo metrics, emails sent/opened/clicked/replied, etc.)

post.description: Get stats for multiple campaigns in a single request

get.description: Get all leads for a campaign with enrichment cost data

200.description: Campaign leads with enrichment run data

get.description: Get all generated emails for a campaign across all runs, with generation cost data

200.description: Campaign emails with generation run data

get.description: List all BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) API keys for the organization

post.description: Store a provider API key. Use scope:'app' for app-level keys (no org/user needed). Omit scope for org-level BYOK keys.

delete.description: Remove a BYOK API key for a specific provider

get.description: Get decrypted BYOK key value. Internal service-to-service endpoint.
List all API keys for the organization

post.description: Generate a new permanent API key for the organization

delete.description: Delete/revoke an API key by ID

post.summary: Get or create session API key
post.description: Get or create a short-lived session API key for Foxy chat integration
Search for leads using Apollo-compatible filters (titles, locations, industries, company size)
Uses AI to qualify/classify an inbound email reply (interested, not interested, out-of-office, etc.)
Scrape brand information from a URL using the scraping service

get.description: Get cached brand info by website URL
Get all brands for the organization
Get a single brand by ID
Get the sales profile for a specific brand
Get all sales profiles (brands) for the organization

post.description: Get AI-generated Ideal Customer Profile suggestion (Apollo-compatible search params) for a brand URL

get.description: Get cost breakdown by cost name for all runs associated with a brand, from runs-service
Get extraction runs for a brand (sales-profile, icp-extraction) enriched with cost data

200.description: Brand extraction runs with cost data

get.description: Get brand scrape result by scrape ID
List available workflows from the workflow-service, optionally filtered by category, channel, or audience type
Get a single workflow with full DAG definition
Returns the workflow with the lowest cost per outcome, filtered by category, channel, audience type, and objective

200.description: Best-performing workflow with DAG and stats

post.description: Uses AI to generate a workflow DAG from a natural language description. The generated workflow is validated and deployed automatically.

422.description: Could not generate a valid DAG

get.description: Server-Sent Events endpoint that pushes real-time campaign updates (new leads, emails, status changes). Connect with EventSource.

post.description: Records user activity event. Fires a lifecycle email deduped per user per day.
